ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws-ia/terraform-aws-mwaa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws-ia/terraform-aws-mwaa
Language: hcl
Terraform module for Amazon MWAA(Apache Airflow)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-alb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-alb
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision a standard ALB for HTTP/HTTP traffic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-codebuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-codebuild
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to easily leverage AWS CodeBuild for Continuous Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-dynamic-subnets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-dynamic-subnets
Language: hcl
Terraform module for public and private subnets provisioning in existing VPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-lb-s3-bucket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-lb-s3-bucket
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision an S3 bucket with built in IAM policy to allow AWS Load Balancers to ship access logs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-log-storage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-log-storage
Language: hcl
This module creates an S3 bucket suitable for receiving logs from other AWS services such as S3, CloudFront, and CloudTrail

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-tfstate-backend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-tfstate-backend
Language: hcl
Terraform module that provision an S3 bucket to store the `terraform.tfstate` file and a DynamoDB table to lock the state file to prevent concurrent modifications and state corruption.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform-aws-consul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-aws-consul
Language: hcl
A Terraform Module for how to run Consul on AWS using Terraform and Packer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-example-foundation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-example-foundation
Language: hcl
Shows how the CFT modules can be composed to build a secure cloud foundation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
Language: hcl
Allows managing a keyring, zero or more keys in the keyring, and IAM role bindings on individual keys

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-vpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-vpn
Language: hcl
Sets up a Cloud VPN gateway
